title: If You Don't Belong to the Heike, You Won't Be a Person
overview: The Taira clan, also known as the Heike, has reached unprecedented power and influence in Japan. Through strange and terrible circumstances, a biwa-playing girl finds herself enmeshed in the story of their political strife.

title: The Glory of the Corrupt World Is a Dream in a Dream
overview: Shigemori rushes to deal with the fallout of Kiyomori's assault on the regent. As Biwa spends more time with Shigemori's family, she begins to open up.

title: Shishigatani Incident
overview: After the passage of several years, Biwa catches up with a friend. A clash with the Enryakuji monks bodes ill for the Heike, and Shigemori is compelled to take drastic action to restrain Kiyomori.

title: Unwritten Affair
overview: Tokuko finally carries Emperor Takakura's child. The prospect of an emperor from the Taira lineage is a happy tiding, but the prospect of Kiyomori's tightening grip on power bodes ill.

title: Bridge Battle
overview: Shigemori's passing hits Kiyomori hard. However, with Shigemori gone, no one is left to stand up to Kiyomori, leaving his whims and ambitions unchecked.

title: City Transition
overview: Kiyomori moves the capital to Fukuhara, a new figure moves against the Heike, and Koremori is charged with leading the counterattack.

title: Kiyomori, Dies
overview: The capital is moved back to present-day Kyoto.Amidst the political turmoil the move ignites, Biwa and the others are shaken by unexpected deaths.

title: Leaving the Capital
overview: Having been kicked out of her home, Biwa sets off on a journey for clues about her mother. The Heike's military challenges continue.

title: Heike Flowing
overview: A chance encounter leads Biwa to her mother. The Heike take refuge in Dazaifu, but their respite is cut short.

title: Dan-no-ura
overview: Having discovered her purpose, Biwa returns to the Heike to witness events play out. The final clash between the Heike and the Genji approaches.

title: The Impermanence of Worldly Things
overview: Biwa witnesses the final clash between the Heike and the Genji. In the aftermath, Biwa sets out to tell the Heike's story.
